gates.title: Managed MCP provider locks are checked against npm latest before release
evidence_required: scripts/verify_managed_mcp_lock.py compares src/managed_mcp/lock.json against npm latest version, integrity, tarball and binary metadata
scripts/pre-release-verify.sh runs the managed-mcp-lock step before release readiness and pytest
tests/test_managed_mcp_release_gate.py covers stale locks, update behavior and MCP binary selection

gates.title: Managed default MCP catalog, lock, runner and client merge stay coherent
evidence_required: src/managed_mcp/lock.json pins exact npm versions with integrity, tarball and bin values
client_sync.py writes NEXO-owned managed MCP entries without overwriting user-owned entries
bin/nexo-managed-mcp.js runs staged artifacts or exact locked npm packages instead of @latest

gates.title: Operational Closure Plane MVP creates ranked, evidence-backed closure items
evidence_required: Migration 78 creates closure_items, closure_item_sources, closure_item_events and closure_daily_snapshots
src/closure_plane.py backfills from protocol tasks, followups, protocol debt, outcomes and the MCP write queue
server.py exposes read/next/get/verify/close tools for closure items

gates.title: Public tool map includes all new server tools
evidence_required: tool-enforcement-map.json includes nexo_managed_mcp_status and all five nexo_closure_* tools
scripts/verify_tool_map.py passes against server.py and plugin tools

gates.title: Public release surfaces and integration artifacts are aligned for v7.30.21
evidence_required: README, llms, homepage, blog index, blog post, changelog page and sitemap reference v7.30.21
Claude plugin, ClawHub skill and OpenClaw package metadata reference 7.30.21
Release smoke and readiness checks validate the v7.30.21 contract before tag publish
